meta.title: Two Degrees from Patrick Miller
meta.description:
This episode of Unsolicited Response wasn’t about tech. It was about the people who move the industry forward.

You don’t need to know everything. You just need to know someone who does. And maybe more importantly—be that person for someone else.

Because in OT security, your network is as critical as your tech stack.
